items.prompt: Elige el reporting verb más preciso (el autor admite algo en contra de su postura):
options: The author concedes that the data are incomplete.
The author asserts that the data are incomplete.
The author highlights that the data are incomplete.
items.value: The author concedes that the data are incomplete.

items.prompt: Empareja el reporting verb con su matiz:
Completa con el reporting verb adecuado (sostener un argumento):
items.text: The researchers ___ that the model is fundamentally flawed.
accepted: contend
items.value: contend

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés (registro académico): "El estudio reconoce sus propias limitaciones."
items.source: El estudio reconoce sus propias limitaciones.
items.value: The study acknowledges its own limitations.
accepted: The study acknowledges its own limitations.
The study acknowledges its own limitations
The study acknowledges its limitations.
The study acknowledges its limitations

items.prompt: Ordena (registro formal): "The author implies that the policy failed."
items.value: The author implies that the policy failed

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The committee acknowledges the underlying tension.
The committee asserts the underlying tension.
The committee implies the underlying tension.
items.value: The committee acknowledges the underlying tension.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: While the author contends that the reform was effective, she concedes that the evidence remains inconclusive.

items.prompt: Inferencia: ¿qué actitud transmite "The report merely implies a correlation, without ever asserting causation"?
options: Cautela deliberada del informe
Convicción absoluta del informe
Rechazo del informe a la idea
items.value: Cautela deliberada del informe

items.prompt: Completa con la nominalización (de 'implement'):
items.text: The ___ of the policy took two years.
accepted: implementation
items.value: implementation

items.prompt: Completa con la nominalización formal (de 'increase'):
items.text: There was a significant ___ in productivity after the reform.
accepted: increase
items.value: increase

items.prompt: Elige la versión más nominalizada (registro académico):
options: The acquisition of new skills enhances employability.
When people acquire new skills, they can get hired more easily.
If you learn new skills, you'll find a job faster.
items.value: The acquisition of new skills enhances employability.

items.prompt: Arma la frase formal: "The analysis revealed a marked deterioration."
Traduce al inglés (registro académico, usa nominalización): "La reducción de costes fue considerable."
items.source: La reducción de costes fue considerable.
items.value: The reduction in costs was considerable.
accepted: The reduction in costs was considerable.
The reduction in costs was considerable
The reduction of costs was considerable.
The reduction of costs was considerable
The cost reduction was considerable.
The cost reduction was considerable

items.prompt: Ordena (registro formal): "The evaluation of the program is ongoing."
items.value: The evaluation of the program is ongoing

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The implementation of the strategy was delayed.
The implication of the strategy was delayed.
The implant of the strategy was delayed.
items.value: The implementation of the strategy was delayed.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: The introduction of the new framework led to a significant increase in operational efficiency.

items.prompt: Completa con la forma pasiva impersonal (de 'argue'):
items.text: It has been ___ that early intervention improves outcomes.
accepted: argued
items.value: argued

items.prompt: Elige la versión más formal e impersonal:
options: The theory is widely regarded as obsolete.
Lots of people think the theory is old now.
Everybody says the theory is out of date.
items.value: The theory is widely regarded as obsolete.

items.prompt: Arma la frase formal: "It is generally assumed that markets self-correct."
Ordena (registro formal): "It has been argued that the method is unreliable."
items.value: It has been argued that the method is unreliable

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés (pasiva formal): "Se ha demostrado que el efecto es duradero."
items.source: Se ha demostrado que el efecto es duradero.
items.value: It has been shown that the effect is lasting.
accepted: It has been shown that the effect is lasting.
It has been shown that the effect is lasting
It has been demonstrated that the effect is lasting.
It has been demonstrated that the effect is lasting
It has been shown that the effect is long-lasting.
It has been shown that the effect is long-lasting

items.prompt: Elige el reporting verb pasivo más cauto (sin afirmar como hecho):
options: It is suggested that the link may be causal.
It is proven that the link is causal.
It is obvious that the link is causal.
items.value: It is suggested that the link may be causal.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: It is widely regarded as a turning point.
It is widely regretted as a turning point.
It was widely regarded at a turning point.
items.value: It is widely regarded as a turning point.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: It has been argued that the findings, while compelling, should be interpreted with a degree of caution.

items.prompt: Elige el conector que introduce una cualificación (límite del alcance):
options: with the exception of the youngest group, the trend holds
therefore the trend holds
for example the trend holds
items.value: with the exception of the youngest group, the trend holds

items.prompt: Empareja la expresión de cualificación con su sentido:
Completa con la expresión de cualificación (en gran medida):
items.text: The hypothesis holds ___ a large extent across the samples.
accepted: to
items.value: to

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés (registro formal): "Los resultados son sólidos, con la excepción de un caso atípico."
items.source: Los resultados son sólidos, con la excepción de un caso atípico.
items.value: The results are robust, with the exception of one outlier.
accepted: The results are robust, with the exception of one outlier.
The results are robust, with the exception of one outlier
The findings are robust, with the exception of one outlier.
The findings are robust, with the exception of one outlier
The results are robust, with the exception of a single outlier.
The results are robust, with the exception of a single outlier

items.prompt: Arma la frase formal: "The argument is valid insofar as the assumptions hold."
Ordena (registro formal): "Nonetheless the underlying assumptions remain questionable."
items.value: Nonetheless the underlying assumptions remain questionable

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The conclusions are valid to a large extent.
The conclusions are valid to a large content.
The conclusions are valid for a large extent.
items.value: The conclusions are valid to a large extent.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: To a large extent, the findings underpin the prevailing theory; nonetheless, several anomalies warrant further investigation.

checkpoint.prompt: Elige el reporting verb más preciso (admitir un punto en contra):
options: The author concedes that alternative explanations exist.
The author asserts that alternative explanations exist.
The author highlights that alternative explanations exist.
checkpoint.value: The author concedes that alternative explanations exist.

checkpoint.prompt: Inferencia: "The paper stops short of asserting causation." ¿Qué transmite?
options: Evita afirmar la causalidad
Afirma rotundamente la causalidad
Niega cualquier relación

checkpoint.prompt: Empareja la expresión con su sentido:

checkpoint.text: The ___ of the reform was widely debated.
accepted: introduction

checkpoint.text: It has been ___ that the correlation is robust.
accepted: demonstrated

checkpoint.prompt: Traduce al inglés (registro académico): "En gran medida, los hallazgos sustentan la teoría."
checkpoint.source: En gran medida, los hallazgos sustentan la teoría.
checkpoint.value: To a large extent, the findings underpin the theory.
accepted: To a large extent, the findings underpin the theory.
To a large extent, the findings underpin the theory
To a large extent the findings underpin the theory.
To a large extent the findings underpin the theory
To a large extent, the findings support the theory.
To a large extent, the findings support the theory

checkpoint.prompt: Ordena (registro formal): "It is widely regarded as a seminal contribution."
checkpoint.value: It is widely regarded as a seminal contribution

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The increase was significant, nonetheless it was temporary.
The increase was significant, nevertheless it was temporal.
The increase was insignificant, nonetheless it was temporary.
checkpoint.value: The increase was significant, nonetheless it was temporary.

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The underlying assumptions were never made explicit.
The underlining assumptions were never made explicit.
The underlying assumptions were never made implicit.
checkpoint.value: The underlying assumptions were never made explicit.

checkpoint.text: With the exception of one anomalous case, the implementation is widely regarded as a significant success.
